title: rubus menkei subsp. distractus
intro: Rubus menkei subsp. distractus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan wild raspberry, is a plant species in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues such as digestive problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rubus menkei subsp. distractus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, among others. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
